task: data discovery recommendation for large-scale scientific facilities
input: user-query patterns, facility metadata, domain-specific data models, user associations (knowledge graph)
output: ranked list of relevant data products (e.g., datasets, observations) for a given user query
backbone: collaborative knowledge-aware graph attention network (CKAT) with GNN encoder
key_idea: leverage collaborative signals and knowledge associations via graph neural networks with a knowledge-aware attention mechanism to recommend scientific data products
